decision: Added isinstance(created, str) guard in fetch_items before _parse_created call
reasoning: AC-2-010 requires dirty-data tolerance; None was guarded but non-string (e.g. int) caused AttributeError on .replace()

decision: Extended parametrized test_auth_failures_fail_fast to assert TOKEN not in str(exc_info.value) for 403 path
reasoning: Production code already correct; test gap only. Extending existing parametrized test per watch_item instruction, not adding new test

decision: Used patch.object(httpx.Client, __init__, capturing_init) to capture verify kwarg before delegating to real_init
reasoning: httpx does not expose verify flag post-construction; patching __init__ is the only way to observe the argument at construction time without mocking the entire client

decision: BUG-1 verified fixed: isinstance(created, str) guard in fetch_items prevents AttributeError on non-string created_at
reasoning: Code review confirms guard fires before _parse_created; _map_item unaffected; no regression

decision: BUG-2 verified fixed: test_auth_failures_fail_fast[403] now asserts TOKEN not in str(exc_info.value)
reasoning: Production code was already correct; test assertion gap closed; 401 and 403 paths both covered

decision: BUG-3 verified fixed: patch.object captures verify kwarg; mutation verify=False now kills test; teardown clean via CM
reasoning: real_init delegated correctly; close() inside with block; 76 sequential tests pass with no leakage
